mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, created_at, updated_at FROM specializations ORDER BY name ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO specializations ( name, description, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{description}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE specializations SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id}
